creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
P.S. I've got some changes in the pipeline that I'm
going to be pushing that add a couple of additional
options. I won't be able to get them in for a couple
of weeks. I'll convert the options to OPT_CONFIGURE_ENABLE
at that time.

Thanks again for all your time and efforts here, Gleb. :)

--Chris
